hero.headline: Learn Smarter, Score Higher!
hero.subheadline: AI-powered study companion for Odia Board, CBSE & ICSE students. Personalized lectures, fun quizzes, and instant doubt clearing.

about.title: What is QuizItNow?
about.content: QuizItNow is an AI-powered learning platform designed for Indian school students. Upload your textbooks and let our AI create personalized daily lectures and quizzes tailored to your class level and board.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.content: We are a team of educators and technologists passionate about making quality education accessible to every student in India, whether they study in English, Hindi, or Odia medium schools.

aim.title: Our Aim
aim.content: To empower every Indian student with AI-assisted personalized learning, making exam preparation effective, engaging, and enjoyable — regardless of their location or background.

boards.title: Choose Your Board
boards.subtitle: Personalized study plans for every curriculum

odia.name: Odia Board
odia.desc: BSE Odisha curriculum with Odia, Hindi & English medium support

cbse.name: CBSE
cbse.desc: Central Board of Secondary Education with NCERT-aligned content

icse.name: ICSE
icse.desc: Indian Certificate of Secondary Education with detailed syllabus coverage
